jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Plum
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Plum! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Plum:
Plum is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Plum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
